summary: E-commerce admin system with product management and order tracking
architectural_notes: Product fields: name, price (₹), description, image, category, stock quantity
Separate product management page from main dashboard
React + TypeScript frontend with Tailwind CSS

existing_features.title: Create a dedicated Product Management page separate from the main admin dashboard where admins can view all products in a table format with columns for product name, price (₹), description, image, category, and current stock quantity
Add inventory adjustment controls on the Product Management page allowing admins to add or subtract stock quantities for existing products with numeric input and increment/decrement buttons

Implement full CRUD operations on the Product Management page: allow admins to add new products with all fields (name, price in rupees, description, image, category, stock quantity), edit existing products, and remove products from the catalog

Create an Orders Dashboard section within the admin panel that displays all incoming customer orders in real-time with order details including order ID, customer information, ordered products with quantities, total price, order status, and timestamp
Add navigation link in the main admin dashboard header to access the new Product Management page

new_feature_requests.summary: Product management page with add/edit/remove products and inventory adjustment
Orders dashboard with real-time order tracking and details
Backend Motoko canisters for products and orders storage
Internet Identity authentication for admin access
